title: Tart Portuguese Rice Risotto
description: A bright, tart and dense rice risotto with caramelized onions, lemon, and a hint of vinegar, perfect for a brunch mood.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat until shimmering.
Add sliced onion and sauté until translucent and golden, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the Carnaroli rice, stirring to coat the grains and lightly toast for 2 minutes.
Deglaze the pan with 1 cup dry white wine, stirring until the liquid has mostly evaporated.
Gradually add the hot vegetable broth, one ladle at a time, stirring frequently, letting each addition absorb before adding the next.
When the rice is al dente and the mixture is creamy, stir in the lemon zest, lemon juice, dried thyme, salt, and pepper.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let the risotto rest for 3 minutes before serving.
